issue.title: Clarify staged WPHX PHP custom compiler strategy

artifacts.role: accepted Adapter IR ADR clarified to name WPHX PHP as the staged custom compiler lane
PHP emission architecture clarified around staged custom compiler scope and promotion gates
compiler operations guidance for future-backend-ready annotations, ABI metadata, and Adapter IR
agent rule requiring WPHX PHP work to treat Adapter IR as staged custom compiler input
operations copy of agent instruction clarification
program rollup recording strategy clarification without score movement

claims: WPHX PHP is the active staged custom PHP compiler lane, not merely a temporary shell generator.
The current admitted scope remains Adapter IR-backed WordPress original-path public adapter emission.
Stock Haxe PHP remains the private implementation emitter and std/php oracle until fixtures move that responsibility.
New Haxe annotations, ABI metadata, and Adapter IR nodes should be designed as future inputs to a broader WPHX PHP backend or extracted reflaxe.php target without Haxe source rewrites.
non_claims: This receipt does not claim WPHX PHP is already a complete arbitrary-Haxe PHP backend.
This receipt does not move the WordPressHX progress score.
This receipt does not add new PHP lowering features, WordPress runtime parity, generated public PHP adapters, or installed distribution behavior.
